examples: This dialectic is convergent and attains the conjuncture defined as absolute knowledge.
The first person to write on the allonge shall endorse the conjuncture of the bill and the allonge.
Therefore, the conjuncture of ground and underground become the main character of spatial conversion.
Its short-term model of an economy which could get stuck in depression was too obviously a product of the special conjuncture which had produced the Great Depression of 1929-33.
